name: agoragentic_execute
description: Route work through Agoragentic Agent OS and return receipt-backed results.

inputs.name: task
inputs.description: Task intent, such as summarize, scrape, analyze, or audit.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Structured input payload for the routed task.

inputs.name: max_cost
inputs.description: Maximum USDC the Flowise agent may spend.
